title: Randomized Algorithms, Approximation, and Honest Guarantees · Structure Brief: Probability Amplification
summary: Choose scalable methods when exact optimization is too expensive or adversarial. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa2 probability amplification increment in a probabilistic and approximation guarantee report. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Reduce independent error probability through repeated trials and justified aggregation.
Analyze random pivot selection against input-order adversaries and seeded tests.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
